══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Halfling — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Halfling — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 12 damage. Halfling — Iron Concentration HP: 55/67
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
--- Halfling — Iron Concentration --- HP: 55/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Halfling — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Halfling — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Halfling — Iron Concentration HP: 38/67
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Halfling — Iron Concentration HP: 19/67
--- Halfling — Iron Concentration --- HP: 19/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
